name: Aston Kaanapali Shores
description: Aston Kaanapali Shores is a place to play pickleball in Lahaina, HI. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Eddie Tam Memorial Center
description: Come play pickleball at Eddie Tam Memorial Center in Makawao, HI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
open_play_schedule: Also available the 2nd and 4th Monday of every month 6pm-8:30pm

name: Kapalua Tennis Garden
description: Come play pickleball at Kapalua Tennis Garden in Lahaina, HI! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Ke Nani Kai Resort
description: Guests of the Ke Nani Kai Resort are able to use these courts.

name: Lahaina Civic Center
description: Lahaina Civic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lahaina, HI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Lanai Park And Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Lanai Park And Tennis Courts in Lanai City, HI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Loney's Kula Pickleball Court
description: Come play pickleball at Loney's Kula Pickleball Court in Kula, HI! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. You can reserve the court.

name: Luna Lei
description: Luna Lei is a place to play pickleball in Paia, HI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Maui Country Club
description:
2 dedicated outdoor courts
4 courts with painted lines but occasionally used for tennis

name: Molokai Wavecrest Resort
description: Guests of the Molokai Wavecrest Resort are able to play pickleball on these courts.

name: Napili Park
description: Napili Park is a place to play pickleball in Lahaina, HI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: OHANA Pickleball Club
description: OHANA Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Lahaina, HI. There are 14 clay courts. 12 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, youth programming, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, lights, and adaptive programming.

name: Pickleball courts @ The Westin
description: Pickleball courts @ The Westin is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lahaina, HI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Tennis Courts by Lanai Youth Center
description: Tennis Courts by Lanai Youth Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lanai City, HI. There are 2 outdoor concrete and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: The War Memorial Sports Complex
description: The War Memorial Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kahului, HI. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: The Whaler on Ka'anapali Beach
description: Come play pickleball at The Whaler on Ka'anapali Beach in Lahaina, HI! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Wailea Tennis Club
description:
***AS OF 1/1/2025, PICKLEBALL COURTS AT WAILEA TENNIS CLUB ARE CLOSED INDEFINITELY***
The Wailea Tennis Club is a private membership facility that is also open to the public. Non-member residents fee is $17 per player with valid Hawaii ID. All others without a valid Hawaii ID fee is $28 per player. The fee guarantees a minimum of 1.5hr court time.
There are 10 courts. No play before 8:30am due to noise complaints. 4 courts reserved for members/guests only every day 8:30-10am. All courts available for open, drop in play after 10am.
For more info, call the Pro Shop @ 808-879-1958.
fees: Members only — Non-members - $17 per player with valid Hawaii ID, $28 per player w/o valid Hawaii ID.

name: Waipuilani Park
description: Waipuilani Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kihei, HI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
